Name: VMware Workspace ONE
Author: Microsoft - support@microsoft.com
Description:
The VMware Workspace ONE solution for Microsoft Sentinel enables ingestion of enrolled device inventory and installed application details from Workspace ONE UEM into Microsoft Sentinel.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:
- Microsoft Sentinel
- Azure Monitor Logs
- Data Collection Rules (DCR)
- Codeless Connector Platform (CCP)

Dependencies:
- A valid VMware Workspace ONE UEM tenant
- Workspace ONE API credentials
- API access to device inventory and installed application endpoints
